title: RRID/Cellosaurus round-trip validation
context: Identifier integrity requires that every Cellosaurus RRID round-trips correctly between the catalog and Cellosaurus, catching mismatches (backlog). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Add RRID/Cellosaurus round-trip validation that confirms each catalog RRID resolves back to the same Cellosaurus entity.
acceptanceCriteria: Validation confirms each catalog RRID resolves to the matching Cellosaurus accession and back (round-trip), flagging mismatches.
Runs in CI as an identifier-integrity gate; reviewed by maintainer.
output: A merged PR adding RRID/Cellosaurus round-trip validation to CI.
